Forest Haven
🌲 how to play 🌲
🗺️ THE WORLD
You are a woodland creature exploring a living pixel forest. Forage food, chop trees, plant saplings, and chat with animal residents who have their own lives and personalities.
Time passes as you explore — watch for dawn, dusk, and night. Seasons change across days, affecting the world around you.
Sleep when you're ready to advance to the next day and restore your energy.
⌨️ CONTROLS
WASDMove your character around the forest
SPACEForage items, talk to nearby animals
HOLD SPACEHold 3 sec near a tree to chop it — yields 2 logs + 50% chance of a sapling
PPlant a sapling on nearby grass (if you have one in your bag)
CLICKClick an animal directly to start a conversation
BOpen or close your bag / inventory
ZSleep and begin the next day
🦊 CHARACTERS
🦊
FOX
Swift Trailblazer
⚡ Fastest in the forest
🦝
RACCOON
Crafty Collector
🌿 Picks up double items
🐿️
CHIPMUNK
Master Hoarder
🎒 Largest inventory
🐾 RESIDENTS
🐻 Bramble the Bear — a wise elder who knows the forest's oldest secrets.
🦔 Pip the Hedgehog — excitable and curious, always collecting something new.
🦉 Vesper the Owl — philosophical and nocturnal; most talkative after dark.
🦌 Fern the Deer — gentle and observant, knows every plant in the forest.
💡 TIPS
Forageable items like 🍄 mushrooms and 🫐 berries respawn over time — explore widely.
Replant saplings after chopping to keep the forest thriving and maintain your wood supply.
Walk close to an animal until a glowing ring appears, then press SPACE to talk.
Check your bag (B) often — it shows everything you've collected and how much space remains.
✦ A WOODLAND ADVENTURE ✦

❓ HOW TO PLAY ✕
WASDMove around the forest
SPACEForage items, talk to animals
SPACE
HOLDHold 3s near a tree to chop it (2 logs + 50% sapling)

📦 BAG ✕
🌲
FOREST HAVEN
A peaceful woodland world...
Use WASD to explore the forest. Press SPACE near glowing items to forage them. Walk up to animals and press SPACE (or click them) to have an AI-powered chat! Press Z to sleep and start a new day. 🌲
